---
title: ""
page-layout: full
editor: 
  markdown: 
    wrap: 72
---

::: page-header
# Education & Experience
:::

------------------------------------------------------------------------

## Current appointments

| Role                                       | Organisation                                             | Days              |
|------------------------|------------------------|------------------------|
| PhD Candidate                              | RMIT University                                          | 24/7, 365         |
| Industry Partner (PhD) & School Counsellor | CatholicCare Victoria / Sacred Heart Primary School, Kew | Tuesdays/flexible |
| Sessional Academic                         | RMIT University                                          | Fridays           |
| Associate Lecturer                         | Cairnmillar Institute                                    | Mondays           |

------------------------------------------------------------------------

## Education

::: role-section
::: role-block
::: role-header
[Doctor of Philosophy (Psychology)]{.role-title} [2025 --
present]{.role-date}
:::

[RMIT University --- School of Health and Biomedical
Sciences]{.role-org} [Supervised by Dr Daniel Zarate, Dr Vasileios
Stavropoulos, and Dr Taylor Brown. Research focus on emotionally based
school avoidance, intervention evidence, longitudinal modelling, and
population-level attendance data.]{.role-desc}
:::

::: role-block
::: role-header
[Master of Professional Psychology]{.role-title} [2024 --
2025]{.role-date}
:::

[Victoria University]{.role-org} [Provisional registration with the
Psychology Board of Australia.]{.role-desc}
:::

::: role-block
::: role-header
[Bachelor of Psychology (Honours)]{.role-title} [2020 --
2023]{.role-date}
:::

[Victoria University]{.role-org} [First Class Honours.]{.role-desc}
:::
:::

------------------------------------------------------------------------

## Academic appointments

::: role-section
::: role-block
::: role-header
[Sessional Academic]{.role-title} [2024 -- present]{.role-date}
:::

[RMIT University]{.role-org} [Tutorial delivery, marking, and student
support across undergraduate and postgraduate psychology units. Units
have included Counselling and Virtual Care, Psychological Assessment and
Individual Differences, Philosophy and Methodology of Psychology,
Organisational and Motivational Psychology, and Counselling and
Professional Practices.]{.role-desc}
:::

::: role-block
::: role-header
[Associate Lecturer]{.role-title} [Feb -- Dec 2025]{.role-date}
:::

[Cairnmillar Institute]{.role-org} [Honours-level tutorial support and
marking for Research Methods and Ethical Practice units. Assistance with
statistical analysis in Jamovi, conceptual clarification, and assessment
support.]{.role-desc}
:::

::: role-block
::: role-header
[Research Assistant --- Cyberpsychology]{.role-title} [Oct 2023 -- Jan
2024]{.role-date}
:::

[RMIT University]{.role-org} [Research support within the
cyberpsychology research group, contributing to data management and
research activities.]{.role-desc}
:::
:::

------------------------------------------------------------------------

## Clinical and school-based roles

::: role-section
::: role-block
::: role-header
[School Counsellor]{.role-title} [2026 -- present]{.role-date}
:::

[CatholicCare Victoria / Sacred Heart Primary School, Kew]{.role-org}
[Current school counselling placement within the CatholicCare Victoria
industry partnership. Work spans student wellbeing, emotional
regulation, attendance concerns, and family liaison, alongside
supervised practice toward general registration.]{.role-desc}
:::

::: role-block
::: role-header
[School Counsellor]{.role-title} [2025]{.role-date}
:::

[CatholicCare Victoria / St. Mark's Catholic Parish Primary
School]{.role-org} [School counselling placement as part of the
CatholicCare Victoria industry partnership for the PhD program. Student
wellbeing, early intervention, and family support within a Catholic
primary school setting.]{.role-desc}
:::
:::

------------------------------------------------------------------------

::: history-two-col
::: history-col
## Professional memberships

::: role-section
::: role-block
[Psychology Board of Australia]{.role-title} [Provisional
psychologist]{.role-desc}
:::

::: role-block
[Australian Psychological Society (APS)]{.role-title} [Graduate
member]{.role-desc}
:::

:::
:::

::: history-col
## Skills and tools

::: role-section
::: role-block
[Research software]{.role-title} [R (RStudio), Jamovi, SPSS, Excel, Colab]{.role-desc}
:::

::: role-block
[Methods]{.role-title} [Systematic review, network analysis, latent
growth modelling, growth mixture modelling, longitudinal cohort
analysis]{.role-desc}
:::

::: role-block
[Clinical]{.role-title} [Psychoeducation, CBT-informed approaches, ACT-informed approaches,
emotional regulation, school refusal intervention, student wellbeing,
family consultation]{.role-desc}
:::

::: role-block
[Other]{.role-title} [Academic peer review, research supervision support, peer mentoring]{.role-desc}
:::
:::
:::
:::

------------------------------------------------------------------------

## Prior experience

::: role-section
::: role-block
::: role-header
[Health, Safety & Wellbeing Support Officer]{.role-title} [2022 --
2025]{.role-date}
:::

[State Library Victoria]{.role-org} [Worked within the People &
HSW policy, incident investigation, psychosocial
risk, and the implementation of a new health and safety management
system aligned to ISO 45001.]{.role-desc}
:::

::: role-block
::: role-header
[Student Library Assistant]{.role-title} [2021 -- 2023]{.role-date}
:::

[Victoria University]{.role-org} [Assisted students across VU campus
libraries with research queries, resource location, and online support.
Developed and delivered an internal educational seminar on captioning,
transcription, and accessibility in Teams and Zoom as part of the
Library's monthly DigiBytes series.]{.role-desc}
:::

::: role-block
::: role-header
[Live Captioner, Coordinator & Supervisor]{.role-title} [2016 --
2021]{.role-date}
:::

[Ai-Media]{.role-org} [Provided live verbatim captioning for broadcast,
government, and education clients globally, including major Australian
TV networks, federal royal commissions, and Ivy League institutions.
Progressed to supervisory and operations coordination roles, managing
teams of 100+ casual and freelance staff during the 2020 transition to
online learning.]{.role-desc}
:::
:::
